parameters.query: SELECT * FROM gda_intelligence_log WHERE timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT id, agency, solicitation_number, title, naics_code, eis_fit_score, data_source, response_deadline, stage, created_at FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE response_deadline >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY eis_fit_score DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ api_key: $env.TAVILY_API_KEY, query: 'defense contract award C5ISR Army intelligence cyber SETA 2026', max_results: 8, search_depth: 'advanced', include_domains: ['defensenews.com','fedscoop.com','nextgov.com','govconwire.com','washingtontechnology.com','breakingdefense.com','c4isrnet.com','nationaldefensemagazine.org'] }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT id, agency, solicitation_number, naics_code, eis_fit_score, data_source, response_deadline, stage FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE eis_fit_score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY eis_fit_score DESC, response_deadline ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 15

INSERT INTO gda_intelligence_log (source, agency, finding, category, priority, timestamp)
SELECT
  item->>'source' AS source,
  'DoD / Defense' AS agency,
  LEFT((item->>'title') || ' — ' || (item->>'content'), 500) AS finding,
  'OSINT' AS category,
  'Medium' AS priority,
  NOW() AS timestamp
FROM jsonb_array_elements('{{ JSON.stringify($('Merge Intel').first().json.defense_news && $('Merge Intel').first().json.defense_news.length > 0 ? $('Merge Intel').first().json.defense_news : []) }}'::jsonb) AS item
WHERE (item->>'title') IS NOT NULL
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM gda_intelligence_log
    WHERE finding ILIKE '%' || LEFT(item->>'title', 60) || '%'
      AND timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours'
  )
